name: Contra-Signal Consensus (Ask Wall + Deep Ask Pressure)
hypothesis: Instead of combining a primary signal with a filter, this spec tests the consensus between two potent *contra-signals* from Block C. A high `ask_depth_concentration` (a 'wall' at the BBO) predicts a down move. A high `obi_ex_bbo` (deep ask pressure) can also indicate a down move is coming. When both occur simultaneously, the consensus should provide a high-conviction short signal.
mutation_note: New spec exploring a novel hypothesis: consensus between two different contra-directional primitives (`ask_depth_concentration` and `obi_ex_bbo`) to generate a high-conviction short signal.
